positive: A symmetrical, detailed woodland scene featuring bioluminescent mushrooms, delicate fern fronds, and glowing firefly trails, forming a complex, elegant pattern. The composition should be centered and suitable for a repeat or single apparel print, featuring deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and pops of warm amber light. Style should be a mix of detailed Art Nouveau illustration and ethereal fantasy etching, utilizing strong silhouettes and high contrast against a dark, midnight background. The focus is on the intricate overlapping geometry of nature, creating a mystical, dreamlike, and premium aesthetic. Vector-style details, highly optimized for fabric printing.
